title: biscutella laevigata subsp. fontqueri
intro: Biscutella laevigata subsp. fontqueri, also known as Fontquer's biscutella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving stress, and promoting digestion. Biscutella laevigata subsp. fontqueri is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments.
